::: {.callout-important .difficulty-easy icon="false"}
###  Multi-Step Reasoning

a) Maryam works 8 hours a week and earns 50 QAR per hour. She decides to save $\frac{2}{5}$ of her total weekly earnings. How many weeks will it take her to save 640 QAR?  

b) There are 40 students in a class. $\frac{3}{5}$ are girls. $\frac{1}{4}$ of the girls wear glasses. How many girls in the class wear glasses?
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
### 🔍 Solutions

a) Weekly Pay: $8 \times 50 = 400$  
   Weekly Savings: $(400 \div 5) \times 2 = 160$  
   Weeks needed: $640 \div 160 = 4$ weeks  

b) Total Girls: $(40 \div 5) \times 3 = 24$  
   Girls with glasses: $(24 \div 4) \times 1 = 6$
:::

::: exercise-meta
[Topic: Fractions of Amounts]{.badge .topic-badge}  
[Skills: Logic & Savings]{.badge .skill-badge}  
:::
